003.title: I  am  doing  (现在进行时)
003.explanation:
I am doing (现在进行时)
They're     running.
They   aren't   walking.
现在进行时的形式为：
am/is/are       +doing/eating/running/writing   等。
B      am/is/are      +-ing  表示“现在正在发生某事”:
I'm    working
she's wearing  a  hat
they're  playing  football
I'm  not  watching  television
过去                         现在                        将来
□   Please   be   quiet.I'm   working.(=I’m   working   now)
□  Look,there's   Sarah.She's  wearing   a  brown  coat.(=she  is  wearing   it  now)
□  The  weather   is  nice.It's  not  raining.
□‘Where  are  the  children?'    ‘They're  playing  in  the  park.'
□(on the phone)We're  having  dinner  now.Can  I  phone  you  later?
□  You  can  turn  off  the  television.I'm  not  watching  it.
拼写(参见附录5):
come→coming            write→writing           dance→dancing
run→running           sit→sitting          swim→swimming
lie→lying

I do/work/like 等(一般现在时)
A
They're looking at their books. They read a lot.
they read/he likes/I work等为一般现在时：
记住
he     works/she   lives/ it  rains等：
□ I work in a shop. My   brother    works in  a  bank.(  而不用My  brother  work)
□  Lucy  lives  in  London.Her  parents  live  in   Scotland.
□ It rains a lot in winter.
I    have→he/she/it    has:
□John has a  shower  every day.
拼写(参见附录5):
-es  用于-s/-   sh  /-ch  之后： pass→passes         finish→finishes           watch→watches
-y→-ies:         study→studies        try→tries
还有： do→does                go→goes
B      一般现在时可用来表示一般性的事实、有时或经常发生的事情：
□ I like big cities.
□Your  English  is  good.You  speak  very  well.
□ Tim works very hard.He  starts at 7.30 and finishes at  8  o'clock in the evening.
□ The earth goes round the sun.
□ We do a lot of different things in our free time.
□ It costs a lot of money to build a hospital.
C    always/never/often/usually/sometimes            常与一般现在时连用：
□ Sue always gets to work early. (而不用Sue gets always)
□ I never eat breakfast. (而不用I eat never)
□ We often go away at weekends.
□ Mark usually plays football on Sundays.
□  I  sometimes  walk  to  work,but  not  very  often.
I  don't  ... ( 否 定 式 ) → Unit   6     Do you...? ( 疑问式) → Unit   7       Iam doing与 I  do 比 较 →Unit   8

009.title: Ihave..…./I've   got    …
009.explanation:
Jack is watching television.  He is not playing the guitar.
But Jack has a guitar.
He often plays it and he plays very well.
Jack plays the guitar,
but he is not playing the guitar now.
Is he playing the guitar?           No,he     isn't.           (现在进行时)
Does he play the guitar?           Yes,he    does.          (一般现在时)
现在进行时(I am doing)表示现在或说话的时刻正在发生的事情：
过去                           现在
□ Please be quiet.  I'm   working. (而不用I  work)
□ Tom is having a shower at the moment.(而不用Tom has)
□  Take  an  umbrella  with  you.It's  raining.
□  You  can  turn  off the  television.I'm  not  watching  it.
□ Why  are  you under the table?What  are  you  doing?
一般现在时(I  do)表示一般性的事实、经常或有时发生的事情：
过去                             现在                            将来
□I work every day from 9 o'clock to 5.30.
□ Tom has a shower every morning.
□ It rains a lot in winter.
□I  don't  watch  television  very  often.
□ What do you usually do at the weekend?
下列动词不用于现在进行时(I   am   -ing):
这些动词可用于一般现在时(I  want/do  you  like? 等):
□I'm tired. I want to go home. (而不用I’m wanting)
□'Do  you  know  that  girl?'     'Yes,but   I   don't   remember   her   name.'
□I   don't   understand.What   do   you   mean?

have
have  与 have    got比较
I've got  (something)或 I  have(something)表示“某物是我的”:
□ I've   got  a  new  car.      或   I  have  a  new  car.
□ Sue  has  got  long  hair.      或   Sue  has  long  hair.
□ Have  they  got any children?     或   Do  they  have  any  children?
□   Tim  hasn't  got   a   job.     或       Tim      doesn't    have  a  job.
□  How  much  time   have    you   got?      或       How   much   time   do   you   have? 此外还有：
□ I've  got   a  headache.     或  I  have  a headache.
□  Have you got a cold?     或  Do you have a cold?
过去时为I  had( 无 got)/I     didn’t     have/ Did  you  have? 等：
□ When I first met Sue,she had short hair.
□  He  didn't  have  any  money  because  he  didn't  have  a job.
□ Did you have enough time to do everything you wanted?
have   breakfast/  have  a  shower 等
这些短语中的have表示“吃、喝、拿等”。不可用have got代替：
在下列短语中，要用have(而不用have got):
□ I had a shower this morning.
□  We’re  having  a  party  next  week. You  must  come.
□  Enjoy  your  holiday.Have  a  nice  time!
□ Did you have a good time in Tokyo?
□ Sandra has just had a baby.
□ Can I have a look at your newspaper?
've got a  new shower.
□  I've  got/I  have  a  new  shower.It's  very good.
have ( 而不用have  got)
□ I have a shower every morning.
(而不用I've   got  a shower every morning)
□  A:Where's  Paul?
B:He's  having  a  shower.
(=he's  washing  now)

hete arent a ca  in the car park.

not(-n't)+any

no  之后接名词(no     cars/no     garden 等)。
no   . … .=  not      any   或 not     a

□  We’ve  got  no   coffee.(=we  haven't   got  any  coffee)

动词否定形式+ any  = 动词肯定形式+ no:
□ They haven't got any children.   或   They've got no children. (而不用They haven't got no children)
□  There isn't any  sugar  in your coffee.    或 There's no  sugar in your coffee.
no  与none   比较
no  之后跟名词(no     money/no     children 等):

□  Everything  was  OK.There  were  no  problems.
none 可单独使用(而不带名词):

□‘Were  there  any  problems?'    'No,none.'(=no          problems)
none  与 no-one    比较 none  表示“无”
no-one   表示“没人”
none 是针对How    much?/How     many?的回答(表示物或人):
□    'How    much   money   have   you    got?''None.'(=no    money)

□ A:Have you got any money?
B:I've got some,but not much.
a  lot  of后接各种名词：
□ We  bought  a lot  of food.
□ Paula hasn't got a lot of free   time. 注意：
□ There is a lot of food/money/   water  ...(用动词单数形式)
much  用于疑问句与否定句中：
□ Do you  drink  much  coffee?
□  I  don't  drink  much  coffee.
much 通常不用于肯定句中：
□ I drink a lot of coffee. (而不用I drink much coffee)
□ 'Do you drink much coffee?'      'Yes,a   lot.' (而不用Yes,much) many  与 a  lot  of可用于各种类型的句子之中：
□  We've  got  many    friends/ a  lot  of  friends.
□  We  haven't  got  many    friends/ a lot of friends.
□  Have  you  got  many  friends/ a lot of friends?
much  与a  lot 之后也可不跟名词：
□  Donna  spoke  to  me,but  she  didn't  say  much.
□'Do   you   watch   TV   much?'     'No,  not   much.'(=not       often)
□ We like films, so we go to the cinema a lot.  ( 而不用go to the cinema much)
□I  don't  like  him  very  much.

Unit
95      still      yet      already
A     still
an hour ago
An hour ago it was raining.
noW
It is still raining now.
still 表示“依旧，同往常一样”:
□ I had a lot to eat,but I'm still hungry.(=I was hungry before,and I’m hungry now) □'Did  you  sell  your  car?'     'No,I've   still   got   it.'
□  'Do you  still  live  in  Barcelona?'     'No,I  live  in  Madrid  now.'
yet
Twenty minutes ago they were waiting for Bill.
They are still waiting for Bill. Bill  hasn't  come  yet.
yet  表示“直到现在”
yet 用于否定句(He  hasn't come yet.)与疑问句(Has he  come yet?)中，常位于句末：
□  A:Where's  Emma?
B:She  isn't  here  yet.(=she  will  be  here,but  until  now   she  hasn't  come)
□ A:What are you doing this evening?
B:I  don't  know  yet.(=I  will  know   later,but   I  don't  know   at  the  moment)
□A:Are  you  ready  to  go  yet?
B:Not  yet.In   a  minute.(=I   will  be   ready,but  I’m  not  ready   at  the   moment)
□A:Have  you  finished  with  the  newspaper  yet?
B:No,I’m  still  reading  it.
请比较yet 与 still:
□ She hasn't gone yet.  = She's still here. ( 而不用she is yet here)
□  I  haven't  finished  eating  yet.=I'm  still  eating.
already   表示“已经，比预料中的早”:
□‘What  time  is  Joe  coming?'      He's   already   here.'(=earlier   than   we   expected)
□'I'm  going  to  tell  you  what  happened.'       That's   not   necessary.I   already   know.'
□  Sarah  isn't coming to the  cinema with us.She has already  seen the  film.

New  York.

.….when Sarah is in New York.
(而不用 when Sarah will be)

即一般现在时(I   am/I    go 等)用于when  之后表示将来：
□ When I get home this  evening,I’m going to have  a  shower. (而不用When I will get home)

Learn English with the World's Bestsellers!
英语在用
剑桥“英语在用”( English     in     Use)丛书是一套享誉全球的英语学习用书，自出版以 来 ，全球销量已逾干万册。丛书专为非英语国家的学习者编写，结构明晰，形式简约，重  点突出，注重实用。鉴于剑桥“英语在用”丛书在学习者中的良好口碑，外语教学与研究 出版社新引进了这套丛书的词汇、语法系列的修订新版，以及短语、习语等系列。希望读  者朋友们通过这套高品质的学习用书，真正提高自己的英语水平。
《剑桥初级英语语法》是为初级学习者撰写的英语语法学习用书，简单易懂，既可用来自学，
也可作为课堂教学辅助材料。
内容实用：取材于真实的语料库，涵盖基本语法结构及相关问题；
使用方便：每单元为一个对开页，左手页讲解语法，右手页编排相应练习，随学随练；
结构简明：分类解说语法点，方便师生挑选所需内容；
●  语法索引： 将书中讲解的所有重要语法按字母顺序列出，并标注书中位置，方便查找；
补充练习：针对某些语法点进行重点练习加以巩固；
学习指导：测试语法知识，找出薄弱环节，并指出最适于学习的单元内容；
●  参考答案： 详尽全面，便于学生自测学习效果，掌握进度。
此版本仅限在中华人民共和国境内(不包括香港 特别行政区、澳门特别行政区及台湾省)销售。
